blog.title: File Transfer Guides & Tips

how_it_works.title: How OneTimeDrop Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Transfer files from phone to computer in under 30 seconds.

steps.title: Open on your computer
steps.desc: Visit onetimedrop.com on the computer you want to send files to. An 8-digit code and QR code appear instantly — no account needed.

steps.title: Scan with your phone
steps.desc: Point your phone camera at the QR code, or open onetimedrop.com on your phone and tap "Join session" to type the code manually.

steps.title: Upload files
steps.desc: Pick photos, PDFs, or documents from your phone. Files transfer in real-time and appear on the desktop immediately.

steps.title: Download on the computer
steps.desc: Click Download next to any file on the desktop. Files are auto-deleted after 10 minutes for your privacy.

how_it_works.cta_desc: Open OneTimeDrop on your computer to get a code.

faqs.a: Yes, completely free. No account, no subscription, no hidden fees.
Files are automatically deleted after 10 minutes. This is by design to protect your privacy.

faqs.q: Do I need to install anything?
faqs.a: No. OneTimeDrop works entirely in your web browser on both phone and computer. No app download required.

faqs.q: What is the maximum file size?
faqs.a: Each file must be under 250MB. You can upload up to 20 files per session.
Files are stored temporarily on our server and protected by a unique session token. They are never publicly accessible and are auto-deleted after expiry.

faqs.q: Can I send files from the computer to my phone?
faqs.a: Currently, OneTimeDrop is optimised for phone → computer transfers. Desktop-to-phone is coming soon.
Images, PDFs, Microsoft Office documents, text files, video, and audio files are all supported.

faqs.q: Does it work on public/library computers?
faqs.a: Yes — just remember your files will be temporary. Don't upload sensitive documents on public computers.

contact_page.title: Get in touch

contact_page.message_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind...

errors.generic: We couldn't send your message. Please try again.
errors.unavailable: The contact form is temporarily unavailable.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes and try again.
errors.name_length: Name must be between 2 and 80 characters.
errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.message_length: Message must be between 10 and 2000 characters.
